details.test: Task 1: Cheapest vitamin D 2000 IU x2 flow
Task 2: Budget supplement mini kit (3 items)
Task 3: Compare two supplements by review count and buy best
Task 5: Two 4+ star supplements with combined price under $30
Task 6: Start monthly subscription for 100+ count supplement
Task 7: Order 2 units of a free-shipping product
Task 8: Checkout single supplement with Standard Shipping
Task 9: Wishlist 3 supplements and move highest-rated to cart
